# LoL Sensei - AI Coach for League of Legends

## About

LoL Sensei is an AI-powered coaching desktop app for League of Legends that teaches players why decisions are made, not just what to click. The product focuses on pre-match and champion-select educational content (team synergies, counter-picks, lane matchups, itemization rationale) with a minimal runtime footprint and no real-time in-game overlays during live play.

## APIs

No public APIs are exposed for LLM consumption. The `/api/contact` endpoint is a private form submission handler and is not intended for automated use.

## Pricing

- Free tier: Champion select coaching, game-start strategy, real-time build advisor.
- Pro tier (EUR 7.99/month): All free features plus priority server access.

## Languages

Available in English, Italian, Korean, Chinese (Simplified), Portuguese (Brazil), Spanish, French, and German.

## Data sources

Read-only public data via the official Riot Games API. User consent is required for Riot ID linking.
